Lines.Text: (Instrumental)
Up at dawn I'm jumpin' outta bed (Outta bed)
I throw my baggies on, the water is callin'
Grab my board, my bag, I'm rockin' hard (Swappin' bag)
Off-shore the flowing swells are growin' real tall and
Into liquid badlands at point-break
Sight the line of who's on my left, my right
Waiting all day for that mack A-frame
Now pop-up, drop in, take off
I'm on my way
Freeze up and ride your goofy foot
Too fast, you know we like to ride off the hook
Off the deep end rolls, rise up and rock that perfect ten
Saw the me that I wanna be
Ridin' free, Xtreme, oh baby can't you see
Cut the leash so I can breathe
And now in me I can believe
Look in the mirror
Look in the mirror
Look in the mirror and tell me what you see
Saw the me that I wanna be in the mirror
Right where we oughta be
(Instrumental)
Carvin' up and down from trough to crest (Trough to crest)
I skipped the curtain now I'm eyein' the barrel
Hangin' loose until I'm hangin' five (Hangin' ten)
I hit the lip and then I got off it manual
Give it back and you can have me
All the world laughing, you hold me back
Losing me, will only bring me 'til I reach the end!
Saw the me that I wanna be
Ridin' free, Xtreme, oh baby can't you see
Cut the leash so I can breathe
And now in me I can believe
Look in the mirror
Look in the mirror
Look in the mirror and tell me what you see
Saw the me that I wanna be in the mirror
Right where we oughta be
Standing there (Standing there)
Standing there (I'm gonna be)
Standing there (If I fall, carry me)
Standing there
Standing in the mirror
Standing in the mirror
That's right
Bein' who we wanna be
Ridin' free, unleashed, oh baby can't you see
This ain't who we're gonna be
This is who we've always been
Ridin' free (Oh, radical freedom)
Ridin' free (Oh, radical freedom)
Found out who we wanna be in the mirror
Right where we oughta be
I'm standin' (I'm standin')
I'm standin' (I'm standin' here)
I'm standin' (I'm standin')
I'm standin' (I'm standing here with you)
We're standin' (We're standin')
We're standin' (We're standin' here)
We're standin' (We're standin')
Here riding side by side until we die
